caption: The video captures a man performing live music in front of an audience. He is seated and playing a guitar while singing into a microphone. The man is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest with decorative patterns. The setting appears to be indoors, possibly in a community center or a small concert hall, as indicated by the wooden blinds in the background. The audience, consisting of people of various ages, is seated and attentively watching the performance. The atmosphere seems intimate and engaging, with the performer fully immersed in his music. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner of the screen, suggesting that the event might be associated with this organization.
